languages.text: {n}Механо-ладонь и массивный меч заменяют конструкту передние манипуляторы. Обе конечности покрыты крючковатыми шипами — несомненно, для усугубления страданий жертвы. С другой стороны конструкта бронебойные пластины складываются в хвост, извивающийся как у скорпиона. Вместо жала на его конце — пара дальнобойных орудий неизвестного вам образца.{/n}

{n}Механо-ладонь и массивный меч заменяют конструкту передние манипуляторы. Обе конечности покрыты крючковатыми шипами — несомненно, для усугубления страданий жертвы. С другой стороны конструкта бронебойные пластины складываются в хвост, извивающийся как у скорпиона. Вместо жала на его конце — пара дальнобойных орудий неизвестного вам образца.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The construct's front manipulators were replaced with a massive sword and a mechanic palm. Both limbs are embellished with hooked barbs — doubtlessly to inflict additional suffering to the victim. The machine's armoured plates at the other join to create a prehensile scorpion-like tail with a pair of unknown projectile weapons where one would expect to find a stinger.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die vorderen Manipulatoren des Konstrukts wurden durch ein massives Schwert und eine mechanische Hand ersetzt. Beide Gliedmaßen sind mit hakenförmigen Widerhaken verziert — zweifellos, um dem Opfer zusätzliches Leid zuzufügen. Die gepanzerten Platten der Maschine am anderen Ende verbinden sich zu einem skorpionartigen Schwanz mit zwei unbekannten Projektilwaffen an der Stelle, an der man einen Stachel erwarten würde.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The construct's front manipulators were replaced with a massive sword and a mechanic palm. Both limbs are embellished with hooked barbs — doubtlessly to inflict additional suffering to the victim. The machine's armoured plates at the other join to create a prehensile scorpion-like tail with a pair of unknown projectile weapons where one would expect to find a stinger.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les manipulateurs avant de la construction ont été remplacés par une épée massive et une paume mécanique. Les deux membres sont ornés de barbillons crochus, sans doute pour infliger des souffrances supplémentaires à la victime. Les plaques blindées de la machine se rejoignent à l'autre extrémité pour former une queue préhensile en forme de scorpion, dotée d'une paire d'armes à projectiles inconnues à la place d'un dard.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The construct's front manipulators were replaced with a massive sword and a mechanic palm. Both limbs are embellished with hooked barbs — doubtlessly to inflict additional suffering to the victim. The machine's armoured plates at the other join to create a prehensile scorpion-like tail with a pair of unknown projectile weapons where one would expect to find a stinger.{/n}

languages.text: {n}结构体的前部操纵器换成了一把巨剑和一只机械手掌。两只肢体上都有钩状倒刺--无疑是为了给受害者带来更多痛苦。机器另一侧的装甲板连接在一起，形成了一个像蝎子一样的伸缩尾巴，在人们期望找到刺的地方有一对未知的投射武器。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The construct's front manipulators were replaced with a massive sword and a mechanic palm. Both limbs are embellished with hooked barbs — doubtlessly to inflict additional suffering to the victim. The machine's armoured plates at the other join to create a prehensile scorpion-like tail with a pair of unknown projectile weapons where one would expect to find a stinger.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Los manipuladores frontales del constructo fueron sustituidos por una enorme espada y una palma mecánica. Ambas extremidades están adornadas con púas en forma de gancho, sin duda para infligir más sufrimiento a la víctima. En el otro extremo, las placas blindadas de la máquina se unen para crear una cola prensil similar a la de un escorpión, con un par de armas de proyectiles desconocidos donde cabría esperar encontrar un aguijón.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The construct's front manipulators were replaced with a massive sword and a mechanic palm. Both limbs are embellished with hooked barbs — doubtlessly to inflict additional suffering to the victim. The machine's armoured plates at the other join to create a prehensile scorpion-like tail with a pair of unknown projectile weapons where one would expect to find a stinger.{/n}

languages.text: {n}構築物の前面のマニピュレーターは、巨大な剣と機械仕掛けの掌に置き換えられている。両手足は鉤状の棘で飾られているが、これは被害者にさらなる苦痛を与えるためだろう。もう片方の装甲板は、針状のサソリのような尻尾を作るために接合されている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The construct's front manipulators were replaced with a massive sword and a mechanic palm. Both limbs are embellished with hooked barbs — doubtlessly to inflict additional suffering to the victim. The machine's armoured plates at the other join to create a prehensile scorpion-like tail with a pair of unknown projectile weapons where one would expect to find a stinger.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Yapının ön manipülatörleri devasa bir kılıç ve mekanik bir avuç içi ile değiştirilmiştir. Her iki uzuv da çengelli dikenlerle süslenmiştir — şüphesiz kurbana daha fazla acı çektirmek için. Makinenin diğer tarafındaki zırhlı plakalar birleşerek, bir iğnenin bulunması beklenen yerde bir çift bilinmeyen mermi silahına sahip, akrep benzeri bir kuyruk oluşturuyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The construct's front manipulators were replaced with a massive sword and a mechanic palm.
